entries.detail: Auto loan application APP-CO-4471 submitted via web channel.
§1704 pre-decision notice rendered on application page; consumer acknowledgment captured.
Underwriting risk score = 0.83 (decline band: > 0.80).
Application declined. Adverse-action reasons: DTI_HIGH, RECENT_INQUIRY.
ECOA adverse-action notice generated; §1704(3) AI augmentation appended (1 paragraph, not duplicate notice).
Consumer submitted §1705 reconsideration request via portal; cited employment-tenure factor as outdated.
Routed to reviewer Olivia Mendez (Sr. Underwriter); SLA: 7 business days.
Opened APP-CO-4471 in reviewer console; pulled model factors, source data, and prior decision rationale.
Updated employment_tenure_months from 4 to 18 (consumer provided employer letter dated 2024-11; pay stub corroborated).
Decision overturned. New disposition: approved at original requested terms. Rationale: corrected tenure shifts model band to 'approve'.
Approval notice sent; §1705 reconsideration disposition record updated.
Application CND-NYC-1188 received for Senior Risk Analyst role.
LL144 pre-use notice acknowledged by candidate.
Candidate rank = 174 of 312 applicants; below role threshold of top 100.
Candidate screened out at first-pass review.
Candidate update email sent; AEDT-use line appended; review-request link included.
Candidate requested human review; cited the tenure-pattern signal.
Routed to recruiter Devon Hall.
Opened candidate file; pulled model factors and resume.
Re-parsed resume; 18-month contract tenure was mis-classified as job-hopping by Skills-Match.
Advanced candidate to recruiter screen.
Advancement notice sent; reconsideration disposition logged.
Captive-finance pre-qualification submitted for 2026 Pinetop Aria EV via pinetopmotors.com. Trade-in VIN linked: 1N4AL3AP5JC987654 (2021 Sentra-equiv, connected services enabled).
CCPA + ADMT pre-use notice rendered on application page; consumer acknowledgment captured. Telematics secondary-use opt-in checkbox: not_checked.
Connected-Vehicle Platform queried prior VIN 1N4AL3AP5JC987654; 12-month telematics summary returned and joined to underwriting feature vector.
Captive-finance risk score = 0.81 (decline band: > 0.78). Top contributing features: debt_to_income_ratio, credit_bureau_score, telematics_risk_signal.
Application declined. ECOA reasons: DTI_HIGH, OTHER_REASON_NON_TRADITIONAL.
ECOA adverse-action notice generated; CCPA/ADMT augmentation appended (one paragraph). Federal bridge attestation: ECOA/Reg B.
Consumer submitted reconsideration request via portal; specifically objects to use of telematics data from prior vehicle, citing no secondary-use opt-in on original CV activation.
Routed to reviewer Olivia Mendez (Sr. Underwriter, Pinetop MAC); SLA: 7 business days.
Opened BUY-CA-7733 in reviewer console; pulled model factors, source data lineage including CV data bridge entry ae-a-003.
Flagged to Privacy team: telematics features used in financing decision without secondary-use opt-in. Erin Park (CPO) attached; finding logged for §7220(c) compliance review.
Removed telematics_risk_signal from feature vector for this decision; re-ran model with credit + application data only.
Decision overturned. New disposition: approved at original requested terms. Rationale: without the (improperly used) telematics signal, applicant scores below decline threshold.
Approval notice sent; reconsideration disposition logged; consumer informed that telematics signal will not be used in any future Pinetop financing decision absent affirmative opt-in.
